steps.t: You should talk to Thorlind, in Felegoth, about what he has found.
Thorlind has spotted spiders harvesting sap along the river-banks of the Rhachló. You should seek out the spiders that Thorlind found.
Thorlind has spotted spiders harvesting sap along the river-banks of the Rhachló. You should approach one of these sap-harvesting spiders.
You should talk to Thorlind by the banks of the Rhachló.
The trail of spider blood begins near the banks of Rhachló and will hopefully lead right to the den of Iphantemel. You should track the wounded spider…
You should talk to Thorlind where he stands just outside Torech Emel.
You should return to Thranduil in Felegoth.
